name: Irish Farmhouse Loaf
recipeInstructions:
Servings: 8
Mix the flour and sugar in a large bowl. Add the dried fruit, lemon rind, butter, baking powder, and baking soda. Stir until combined.
Add the beaten eggs and buttermilk to the dry ingredients. Mix well with a spatula or wooden spoon until a soft dough forms.
Grease a 2-pound loaf pan with butter or cooking spray.
Pour the batter into the prepared pan and smooth the top with a spatula.
Bake at 300°F (150°C) for 1 hour, or until a skewer inserted into the center of the loaf comes out clean.
Remove from the oven and let cool in the pan for 10 minutes before turning the loaf out onto a wire rack to cool completely.
